textByHashes.aea1460362472a9e8ee2e885d6fbfb8c2cc2eb54: Hello young man! Come to visit old Grandpa Jack? I can tell ye stories for sure. I used to be the best fisherman these parts have seen!
textByHashes.307f9c319d79d0fe8e31daf592eaa0c46d5dd2af: Well, when I were a young man we used to take fishing trips over to Catherby; The fishing over there - now that was something!
textByHashes.728aa6cc809a03492860b682d75c5b038c35b4e3: Anyway, we decided to do a bit of fishing with our nets, I wasn't having the best of days turning up nothing but old boots and bits of seaweed. Then my net suddenly got really heavy!
textByHashes.0f4b908c5dede15a5863e3224533256cd1f9389f: To my amazement I'd caught this little chest thing!
textByHashes.058afaabbb386182f3cfd16c0ae5473fbd6c6a28: I know all about that... I won that four years straight! I'm too old for that lark now though...
textByHashes.240c5e2a1dd8bedd7066c640d8189455f1144473: Well, you sometimes get these really big fish in the water just by the outflow pipes.
textByHashes.acafb8ddf10a1f69957c4749ebd59a8abb5d48f9: I think they're some kind of carp...
textByHashes.c110604f6cf26033c463a04d24edbfb8b22875b1: I used to get those from McGrubor's wood, north of here. Just dig around in the red vines up there but be careful of the guard dogs.
textByHashes.26b6f92217aec0b950b8da9ec0475a365f59a076: Ahh well, I'm sure you'll find something to put him off. After all, there must be a kitchen around here with some garlic in it, perhaps in Seers Village or Ardougne. If he's pretending to be a vampyre then he can pretend to be scared of garlic!
textByHashes.c7d08f686297ff2aaabb2ad75abdebd0d98cb1ae: Why you young whippersnapper! If I was twenty years younger I'd show you something that's for sure!
textByHashes.31b770692d58ed73f8acd654d09b477a2c681795: Young people - always in such a rush.
textByHashes.51b07eb65ec12aa4a661e9d94d7a2d23eac1b20e: But young man, you have your own. I'll not sell you mine when you already have one!
textByHashes.9a083de4f589caba512c9c6c1179fc3bb134e3d0: Of course! Let me see now...You'll need a rod and bait. You can fish with a net too, but not in the competition.
textByHashes.dca69e95bfa7450f27e9af00054fdc9835013f8e: Then simply find yourself a fishing spot, either in the competition near here, or wherever you can - I recommend net fishing in Catherby. Net or Lure the fish in the fishing spot by clicking on it and then be
textByHashes.bda5e3072ab87c5f9e6994eb63282cb162a1486b: Hello young lady! Come to visit old Grandpa Jack? I can tell ye stories for sure. I used to be the best fisherman these parts have seen!
textByHashes.480d6ccceb0ecd028bf30dad43610b91e0607f45: Hello young one! Come to visit old Grandpa Jack? I can tell ye stories for sure. I used to be the best fisherman these parts have seen!
textByHashes.9fe66f4bb61dc0c3bb1a7447a3d80bc316e946b6: Even more amazing was when I opened it it contained a diamond the size of a radish! That's the best catch I've ever had!
textByHashes.e33d7c0b9a3e43aa9f35a6c421b8c6fad4f0214c: Of course you can young man. Let's see now...I think 5 gold is a fair price for a rod which has won the Fishing contest before eh?
textByHashes.aa752ed6d7de7a87414a41b82951ea8daf05c470: Right you are. I'll be here.
textByHashes.2d2a2c4170435f4951b07e70804ac43b78a44052: If you're sure.... passing up an opportunity of a lifetime you are.
